source_context.reason_for_pass: The current validated plan proves 100 percent coverage but has too many car hops and small segment outings to be the experience-optimized plan.

manual_review_priorities.decision: One stacked loop day versus upper/lower split days.

manual_review_priorities.area: Dry Creek / Peggy's / Sweet Connie / Shingle / Sheep / Stack
manual_review_priorities.decision: Whether Sweet Connie/Peggy attach to low Dry Creek, high Stack/Shingle, or remain separate necessary grinders.

manual_review_priorities.area: Military / Freestone / Three Bears / Shane's / Curlew
manual_review_priorities.decision: Which Central Ridge/Freestone pieces belong with Military versus Rocky Canyon/Watchman.

manual_review_priorities.area: Seaman / Veterans / Eagle Bike Park pods
manual_review_priorities.decision: Split into one or two westside outings without creating short car errands.
Keep Peggy/Cartwright with Polecat or use them as a bridge toward Dry Creek/Sweet Connie.

blocks.name: Hillside / Harrison / West Climb frontside
blocks.rationale: Compact frontside network; should become one coherent loop/lollipop rather than several small errands.

blocks.name: Camel's Back / Kestrel / Crestline / Lower Hulls even-day
blocks.rationale: Rule-constrained Hulls/Camel loop; Lower Hulls fragments must be assigned to a specific even date.
blocks.requires_specific_date_rule: Lower Hulls foot travel only on even-numbered calendar days per current Ridge to Rivers source check.

blocks.name: Military / Cottonwood / Eagle Ridge core
blocks.rationale: Military core should absorb nearby short stubs, but Central Ridge/Freestone boundary needs GPX review.
blocks.boundary_question: Keep Central Ridge/Ridge Crest/Freestone with Military or split east toward Three Bears/Shane's.

blocks.name: Table Rock / Castle / Rock Island / Shoshone-Paiute
blocks.rationale: Old Pen / Warm Springs block with natural lower-trailhead loop structure.

blocks.name: Polecat core
blocks.rationale: Polecat/Doe/Quick Draw is a natural loop; Peggy/Cartwright boundary should be decided by GPX.
blocks.boundary_question: Keep Cartwright/Peggy with Polecat or move them toward Dry Creek/Sweet Connie.

blocks.name: Cartwright / Peggy's / lower Dry Creek interface
blocks.rationale: Peggy and Cartwright are a bridge problem, not a standalone fragment by default.
blocks.boundary_question: Attach to Polecat core, low Dry Creek, or Sweet Connie/Stack macro-area.

blocks.name: Seaman / Veterans westside pod
blocks.rationale: Separate in-town westside pod from Eagle Bike Park so geography drives the block, not count reduction.
blocks.boundary_question: Can this absorb REI/Big Springs/Rabbit without a messy road hop, or should those sit with Eagle Bike Park?

blocks.name: Oregon Trail / Harris Ridge / Peace Valley
blocks.rationale: Southeast/south Boise pod omitted from the first conceptual list; keep it explicit so Harris/Peace Valley do not become unassigned mop-ups.

blocks.name: Eagle Bike Park / Red Tail / Rabbit pod
blocks.rationale: Eagle-area short trails need a continuous sweep, not multiple small car errands.
blocks.boundary_question: Confirm whether Rabbit/Big Springs/REI belong here or with Seaman/Veterans.

blocks.name: Harlow's / Spring Creek / north pod
blocks.rationale: Northern pod should be a real loop/grinder day, not several small errands.

blocks.name: Hawkins
blocks.rationale: Geographically isolated reserve; keep standalone unless a nearby absorption route proves out.

blocks.name: Upper 8th / Corrals / Sidewinder
blocks.rationale: Largest unresolved mid-foothills block; do not schedule until GPX chooses stacked loop or split.
blocks.boundary_question: One large single-car stacked loop versus upper/lower frontside split.

blocks.name: Freestone / Three Bears / Shane's / Curlew connector block
blocks.rationale: Connector block between Military/Hulls and Rocky Canyon; boundary must be settled by GPX.
blocks.boundary_question: Merge with Military core, Watchman/Rocky Canyon, or keep as standalone connector day.

blocks.name: Watchman / Five Mile / Orchard / Rocky Canyon
blocks.rationale: Northeast frontside loop block; may absorb connector pieces if ratio stays reasonable.

blocks.name: Dry Creek lower cluster
blocks.rationale: Long drainage with high return-to-car tax; review with Peggy/Sweet Connie before scheduling.
blocks.boundary_question: Low Dry Creek standalone versus linked to Peggy/Sweet Connie/Stack macro-area.

blocks.name: Sweet Connie / Shingle / Sheep Camp / Stack Rock
blocks.rationale: Main high-leverage wasted-mileage block. Sweet Connie should be reviewed as access into this network, not as a default standalone outing.
blocks.boundary_question: One long single-car day, two cleaner upper/lower outings, or optional mixed-mode variant.

blocks.name: Bogus day 1: ATM / Deer / Elk / Sunshine
blocks.rationale: High-elevation block with direction rules and calendar priority.

blocks.name: Bogus day 2: Mores / Brewers / Tempest / Lodge / Shindig
blocks.rationale: Second high-elevation resort/Mores block; absorb tiny Bogus pieces here.
